title_en: State of Play Ends With Big God of War Laufey Gameplay Reveal
summary_en: Sony’s big State of Play showstopper was God of War Laufey, the next game in the God of War series from Sony Santa Monica due out exclusively on PS5.
body_en:
Sony’s big State of Play showstopper was God of War Laufey, the next game in the God of War series from Sony Santa Monica due out exclusively on PS5. No release window was mentioned.
God of War Laufey was revealed with an extensive gameplay showcase, confirming Faye, Kratos' "dead" wife, as the main character this time around.
Here’s the official blurb:
We’ve got plenty more on God of War Laufey, including Sony Santa Monica explaining why Kratos is out , a wider interview with the studio , and an explainer on Faye’s story so far .
Here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch up on what PlayStation has in store.
Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
